validated_surface: source.type=http_text classified as renderable with warnings for bounded no-auth reads
Secret Manager placeholder-backed authenticated http_text classified as renderable with warnings
render_gcp_contract emits a BigQuery source_materialization plan
smoke runtime calls the shared core read_http_file_payload reader
text payload lines are written as local newline-delimited JSON
BigQuery local load job receives declared schema_fields
run and lineage evidence use the same materialize_source evidence path as REST/HTTP JSON

Read back target rows and evidence rows from BigQuery.
